title: Add Option in My Work to also display tasks assigned to the teams I belong to
excerpt: When I display my-work, I see only tasks assigned to me. It would be great to have an option to also display the tasks assigned to the different teams I belong too. For now, we need to change the my-work settings each ti…

posts.author: LADK (Leila AIT KACI)
posts.cookedHtml: When I display my-work, I see only tasks assigned to me. It would be great to have an option to also display the tasks assigned to the different teams I belong too. For now, we need to change the my-work settings each time to switch between me and the teams.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @LADK,

Let me know if I’ve misunderstood, however you should have the option to include teams when configuring the my work settings:

Screen Shot 2023-08-02 at 11.20.49 am752×740 40.8 KB

Is this what you’re referring to?

posts.author: LADK (Leila AIT KACI)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Bianca,

Thanks you very much for your reply but this actually does not work for what I am trying to achieve. Indeed, when I select a team in my-work customization, all tasks assigned to any member of the selected team appear while what I would need is that only the tasks assigned to this particular team get listed.

It seems to me that both behaviors are usefull in different use cases. For this reason, I was thinking the customisation could have an additionnal check option to say how teams are used to select tasks.

posts.author: LADK (Leila AIT KACI)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Bianca,

Would you have any update regarding this request ?

Thanks for the good work

posts.author: cbrunskill (Catherine Brunskill)
posts.cookedHtml: Also adding that this comment in the community does a good job describing the functionality needed to be able to see tasks assigned to teams in My work: Show tasks assigned to my team in My Work

posts.author: STNSteph (Steph Diaz)
posts.cookedHtml: @BiancaT - yes this is exactly the functionality we need as well. See when our team has been assigned to something in my work, not member’s of the team work

posts.author: VirtualVines (Roberto)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys!

We have the solution. Our app, MyWeek, allows you to view activities in a calendar view of a week. In fact, you can see all the people assign from your boards by default.

Key Features:

  • Centralize all activities in one dynamic weekly view

  • Customize your week to start on any day

  • Hide weekends for streamlined work planning

  • Group activities by project boards for perfect organization

  • Effortlessly drag and resize schedule items

  • Personalize your view with flexible columns (date/timeline, people & status)

  • Create and edit activities directly within the app

  • Navigate instantly to any day or week with our intuitive calendar

Look for “MyWeek” in monday’s marketplace.

https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000870/myweek

We’re constantly updating our app with new features. You can write to us and we’ll develop what you need. https://wkf.ms/3RUoye3
